title: astragalus flexus
intro: Astragalus flexus, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus flexus include enhanced immune function, reduced fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus flexus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, allowing for convenient consumption and absorption of its medicinal properties.
